dataset_title: ATLAS — A Workforce Framework for Talent, Leadership, and Skills in Data and AI
scope: Covers the full data and AI profession. Explicitly excludes the CISO and cybersecurity workforce, covered by NIST NICE.

architecture.pattern: Entity-separated flat files with foreign key references
architecture.primary_key: role_id for roles, ksa_id for KSAs
architecture.relationship_model: KSAs are independent entities. Roles reference KSAs via relationship tables in /mappings/. Framework mappings are separate files per framework.

roles.description: One file per category_code. Each contains role identity, title, seniority, variants, and source references. No KSAs embedded.

ksas.description: Independent KSA entities by category. Each KSA has a stable ksa_id and exists independent of any role.

frameworks.description: Reference data for each source framework (NICE, SFIA, O*NET, DAMA, etc.)

mappings.description: Relationship tables. role_ksa_* files link roles to KSAs. roles_to_* files link roles to framework references.

career_tracks.description: Career progression paths across roles. Populated in future versions.

job_descriptions.description: Per-role job description templates. Populated in future versions.

role_record.json.description: JSON Schema for CDAIO Domain Master Role Record — 25+ field schema supporting regulatory context, framework mapping, and quantified assessment

validate.py.description: Referential integrity validation script — checks foreign key references across roles, KSAs, and mappings

coverage_gap_test.py.description: R01 Coverage Gap Test — maps team archetypes against current KSA coverage and produces coverage analysis

ksa_quality_audit.py.description: R24 KSA Quality Consistency Audit — evaluates consistency of KSA definitions across existing dataset

update_framework_licensing.py.description: R05 Licensing Update — applies commercial_status classification and citation requirements to frameworks

check_consistency.py.description: Pre-commit consistency validation — checks manifest accuracy, framework consistency, cross-references, CHANGELOG currency, and ADR statuses

methodology.description: Product methodology specifications — scoring models, engagement workflows, deliverable templates, and human-readable methodology documents.

pe-assessment-scoring-model.json.description: R04 PE Assessment Scoring Model — 4 dimensions (Coverage, Capability, Criticality, Concentration Risk), 3 composite indices (TCI, KPRS, GSI), single Workforce Readiness Score (WRS, 0-100)

pe-assessment-workflow.json.description: R04 PE Assessment Engagement Workflow — 30-day, 5-phase process designed for PE deal timelines with phase gates and deliverable milestones

pe-assessment-deliverables.json.description: R04 PE Assessment Deliverables — 4 deliverable specifications (Executive Summary, Workforce Capability Map, Gap Analysis & Hiring Priority Plan, Key Person Risk Assessment)

R04-pe-assessment-methodology.md.description: R04 PE Assessment Methodology — human-readable methodology document for PE operating partners describing the complete assessment approach

TECHNICAL.md.description: Architecture and Data Model — entity-separated flat files, schema design, graph-ready structure

master-schema-design.md.description: Master Schema Design — 25+ field JSON schema documentation with nested regulatory and framework context

field-by-field-assessment.md.description: Field-by-Field Assessment — use case analysis and modification verdicts for every schema field

gap-analysis.md.description: Gap Analysis — 187-role inventory with coverage status against source frameworks

nice-boundary-scoping.md.description: NICE Boundary Scoping — how ATLAS relates to NIST NICE for cybersecurity boundary roles

roadmap.description: Roadmap analysis, validation sprint results, and Architectural Decision Records

ensemble-brainstorm-atlas.md.description: Ensemble Brainstorm — Five-pass strategic analysis (Forward Decomposition, Reverse Induction, Perspective Rotation, Constraint Inversion, Second-Order Mapping) across 6 priority use cases

PHASE-0-VALIDATION-SPRINT-RESULTS.md.description: Phase 0 Validation Sprint Results — consolidated go/no-go decisions and evidence from R01, R02, R05, R24 tests

R01-coverage-gap-test.md.description: R01 Coverage Gap Test — validation that current 37-role KSA coverage spans 92.2% of archetypical data/AI teams

R02-ksa-quality-test.md.description: R02 AI-Assisted KSA Quality Test — validation that AI-drafted KSAs match manual quality (4.26/5 average) with acceptable review burden

R02-ksa-quality-test.json.description: R02 test data and quality scores

R02-ai-authored-ksas.json.description: R02 sample AI-authored KSA set for comparison against baseline

R05-license-audit.md.description: R05 Source Framework License Audit — classification of 70 frameworks by commercial viability (GREEN/YELLOW/RED)

R05-license-audit.json.description: R05 audit data with per-framework commercial_status classification

R05-dependency-analysis.md.description: R05 Framework Dependency Analysis — evidence that all 70 frameworks carry citation-only requirements at minimum; NO dependencies block commercial products

R24-ksa-consistency-audit.md.description: R24 KSA Quality Consistency Audit — 8.2/10 consistency score; documents style drift and establishes requirements for future authoring

R24-ksa-consistency-audit.json.description: R24 audit data and consistency metrics

adr.description: Architectural Decision Records — 11 ADRs documenting rationale, alternatives, and consequences for major roadmap decisions

ADR-001-dependency-driven-roadmap-sequen.description: Sequence roadmap by structural dependencies, not priority

ADR-002-pe-due-diligence-as-beachhead.md.description: PE due diligence assessment as first product

ADR-003-ship-on-current-data-coverage.md.description: Ship on current data; don't wait for full dataset completion. Validated by R01.

ADR-004-eu-ai-act-timeline-urgency.md.description: EU AI Act compliance as urgent parallel track (August 2026 enforcement)

ADR-005-ai-assisted-ksa-authoring.md.description: AI-assisted KSA authoring with quality gates for acceleration. Validated by R02.

ADR-009-agentic-ai-roles-first-mover.md.description: Agentic AI roles as Tier 3 first-mover play

ADR-010-validation-sprint-before-product.description: Validate before building — Phase 0 validation sprint completed with all tests passing or conditional passing

ADR-011-pe-assessment-scoring-model.md.description: PE Assessment Scoring Model Design — documents 5 key design choices for the R04 scoring methodology, alternatives considered, and consequences

ATTRIBUTION.md.description: Framework Licensing Attribution — per-framework licensing notices, commercial_status classification, and required citations for R05 GREEN/YELLOW/RED frameworks

CONTRIBUTING.md.description: Pre-commit discipline checklist — Section A (Update 9 doc surfaces), Section B (Create 7 new doc types), Section C (Verify via check_consistency.py). Commit message convention with roadmap and ADR references.

.github/workflows/consistency.yml.description: CI gate — runs check_consistency.py on every push and PR to main/develop

commercial_audit.finding: All 70 frameworks carry citation-only requirements at minimum. 19 frameworks (GREEN) permit unrestricted commercial use. 28 frameworks (YELLOW) require attribution or specific notice. 23 frameworks (RED) are citation-only with no commercial derivative rights. No dependencies block commercial products.
